'''thadholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjuvant|coadjuvant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjuvant|coadjuvant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thadholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædheleth|thædheleth]] || [[word:thædhelej|thædhelej]] || [[word:thædhelesh|thædhelesh]] || [[word:thædhele|thædhele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhodholoth|thadhodholoth]] || [[word:thadhodholoj|thadhodholoj]] || [[word:thadhodholosh|thadhodholosh]] || [[word:thadhodholo|thadhodholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadholoth|thadholoth]] || [[word:thadholoj|thadholoj]] || [[word:thadholosh|thadholosh]] || [[word:thadholo|thadholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhofloth|thadhofloth]] || [[word:thadhofloj|thadhofloj]] || [[word:thadhoflosh|thadhoflosh]] || [[word:thadhoflof|thadhoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadholotho|thadholotho]] || [[word:thadholojo|thadholojo]] || [[word:thadholosho|thadholosho]] || [[word:thadholoko|thadholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadholoth|thadholoth]] || [[word:thadholoj|thadholoj]] || [[word:thadholosh|thadholosh]] || [[word:thadholo|thadholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadholothol|thadholothol]] || [[word:thadholojol|thadholojol]] || [[word:thadholoshol|thadholoshol]] || [[word:thadholokol|thadholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadholothotho|thadholothotho]] || [[word:thadholojojo|thadholojojo]] || [[word:thadholoshosho|thadholoshosho]] || [[word:thadholoko|thadholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadholothon|thadholothon]] || [[word:thadholojon|thadholojon]] || [[word:thadholoshon|thadholoshon]] || [[word:thadholokon|thadholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadholothoro|thadholothoro]] || [[word:thadholojoro|thadholojoro]] || [[word:thadholoshoro|thadholoshoro]] || [[word:thadholokoro|thadholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
